{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"Implement window command stubs + flag expansion","description":"In an isolated worktree, implement all stubbed window commands and expand flags on existing ones in src/cmd/cmd.zig.

STUBBED COMMANDS TO IMPLEMENT:
- find-window: search windows by name/title/content, parse -i/-C/-N/-T/-r/-Z/-t, match-string
- link-window: link window from src to dst, parse -a/-b/-d/-k/-s/-t
- move-window: move window, parse -a/-b/-r/-d/-k/-s/-t
- resize-window: parse -a/-A/-D/-L/-R/-U/-t/-x/-y, adjustment
- respawn-window: reexecute command in window, parse -k/-c/-e/-t, shell-command
- unlink-window: unlink window from session, parse -k/-t

FLAG EXPANSION ON EXISTING:
- choose-tree: add -G/-N/-r/-Z/-F/-f/-K/-O/-t, template
- kill-window: add -a/-t
- last-window: add -t
- list-windows: add -a/-F/-f/-t
- new-window: add -a/-b/-d/-k/-P/-S/-c/-e/-F/-t, shell-command
- next-layout: add -t
- next-window: add -a/-t
- previous-layout: add -t
- previous-window: add -a/-t
- rename-window: add -t
- rotate-window: add -D/-Z/-t
- select-layout: add -E/-n/-o/-p/-t, layout-name
- select-window: add -l/-n/-p/-T/-t
- split-window: add -b/-d/-f/-I/-P/-Z/-c/-e/-F/-l/-t, shell-command
- swap-window: add -d

Also create src/cmd/window_commands_test.zig with tests for state transitions AND output format.

Reference: tmux(1) 3.5a man page.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-04-03T21:08:26.251Z"}
</teammate-message>

<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
You are a TEAM WORKER in team "tmux-parity". Your name is "worker-window".
You report to the team lead ("team-lead").

Your task: Implement all stubbed WINDOW commands and expand flags on existing window commands in src/cmd/cmd.zig for full tmux 3.5a parity.

STUBBED COMMANDS TO IMPLEMENT (replace cmdNotImplemented with real handlers):
- find-window: search windows by name/title/content. Parse -i (case-insensitive), -C/-N/-T
